acceptance.claim: The sync screen starts with a default directory, the user saves a token on the settings page, returns, and syncs successfully with that saved token.
The token repository stores only trimmed token values, reads missing or blank values as absent, and deletes saved tokens.
The default directory repository creates and returns an application GitSync directory.
The directory sync BLoC loads the default directory and uses the saved token instead of a page-entered credential.
The real Git sync repository stores the clean remote URL and passes HTTP credentials through an askpass environment during push.
